# RestaurantAIBot

RestaurantAIBot helps locals and travelers find restaurants by location, meal, place, and occasion.

## Core Pages

- / — Homepage
- /ai-restaurant-finder.html — AI restaurant finder guide
- /popular-searches.html — Popular restaurant searches
- /restaurant-cities.html — City and cuisine guides
- /owner-advertise.html — Restaurant owner advertising information
- /restaurant-owner-intake.html — Restaurant owner intake page
- /restaurant-website-starter.html — Restaurant website starter page
- /disclaimer.html — Site disclaimer

## Search Pages

- /food-near-hotel.html — Food near hotel
- /restaurants-near-airport.html — Restaurants near airport
- /restaurants-near-convention-center.html — Restaurants near convention center
